name: OI Khaplai
overview: OI KHAPLA is a comic tele-serial and its plot is set in a village. The plots are taken from the daily affairs of a villager’s life. OI KHAPLA is a stress buster of sorts and the comic plots give viewers a respite from the rigours of daily life. OI KHAPLA, therefore, has received wide viewership and the different storylines and plots have been widely acclaimed by viewers.

trailers.title: Oi Khapla - ঐ খাপলা | 12th Oct 2018 | Full Episode | No 999
